g.text: Dart straight across the open floor.
Follow the mewing along the passage.
Head toward the meeting of the passages.
Kneel down and look behind the crate.
Slip on into the pipe maze.
Walk softly toward the shining eyes.
Scramble clear of the leaning crates.
Squeeze into the gap and wait.
Take the safer route deeper in.
Follow the mewing toward the middle.
Grab the safety line and hold on.
Scramble up before the next gust.
Follow the mewing toward the middle.
Bolt for the door in the open.
Steady yourself as the ship lurches.
Scoop up {COMPANION} and slip out fast.
Slip inside for a quick look.
Back away as the bell rings.
Grip the rail as the ship leans.
Freeze and grip the swinging ropes.
Take the hatch down into the ship.
Follow the groan down to the hold.
Grab the rope and pull with them.
Head down the ladder to the hold.
Steady the load and finish the job.
Let it go and scramble clear.
Go down toward the sealed hold.
Find a way in to the frightened creature...
Step closer to the ship's secret.
Try to help calm {SECRET_NAME} and save ...
Race to tell the bridge what you found.
Hum softly to calm the frightened calf.
Head for the bridge with a plan.
Push on to the wheelhouse door.
Steady {SECRET_NAME} so the ship can fly...
Tell everyone the secret and rally the c...
Rush the song in a panic.
Hold the calf steady through the worst o...
Ride out into the calm moonlit sky.
Feel the ship steady beneath you.
Help ease Nimbus out to the open air.
Watch the sky-whale take to the air.
Settle Nimbus safe for the voyage.
Take your place among the crew.
Accept {CAPTAIN}'s trust and a real task...
Save the ship together, secret and all.
